why: CHART: rejected 7538-39 double-top, 5 declining candles rolled price to 7525, just broke BELOW VWAP 7528, momentum accelerating down (5m -0.08%, 15m -0.14%). GEX CONFIRM: regime flipped +65M->NEGATIVE gamma (levels break/fuel), 7555 pika now overhead ceiling, ~45pts of air below to lone 7480 floor. Transition out of the morning pin = 0DTE move.

CHART: 7518.7 breakdown low HELD and bounced to 7521, 5m momentum flipped +0.03%, down-move exhausting/not accelerating. GEX: negative gamma easing -15M->-6M = fuel draining. Bank the modest short gain before it round-trips to VWAP 7527.

CHART: clean downtrend, lower highs/lows 7521->7518->7516->7510, below VWAP 7526, 11:35 broke 7516 with a -6pt candle closing at its low, momentum negative (15m -0.11%). GEX CONFIRM: negative gamma intensified to -42M near-spot (real fuel), king is now a barney at 7500 (downside magnet, not support), air below to 7480 floor. Stronger confirm than first trade.

CHART: reached 7500 target, price rejected the first 7500 test (7501.4->7502.1 bounce), 5m momentum easing. GEX: hit the 7500 barney (my next opposing node), and the 7480 pika floor is building fast (+12.7M, 1mΔ+1.0) = fresh support forming below, air draining. Cap the 0DTE short winner (+0.11%) at the node before round-trip.

CHART: countertrend bounce made a lower high at 7516.9, rejected BELOW VWAP 7521 (never reclaimed), now rolling over — 12:40 down candle broke the coil to 7511.8, momentum turning negative. GEX CONFIRM: negative gamma at deepest of the day -52M near-spot (max fuel), 7500 barney magnet strengthening -45M, air below to 7485 floor. Cleanest bearish confirm of the session.

CHART: 7500 refused to break after ~4 tests, price defends 7507 support and is range-bound 7507-7516, 5m momentum flipped +0.04%. GEX: 7485 floor now shrinking (1mΔ-1.5), barney pull not converting to a break. Thesis was a break to 7500/7485; it stalled. Bank the small gain, stop churning the range.

CHART: 4-candle grind up off the 7506 pin (7510.7->7513->7516.2->7516.9), just RECLAIMED VWAP 7516.86 (first time above since morning), momentum positive (15m +0.10%). GEX CONFIRM: strong POSITIVE gamma +85M (levels hold), king flipped to the 7525 pika (+32M) = magnet target above, pika floor support at 7510 below. Positive-gamma drift to the king pika. Cap at 7525.

CHART: failed to hold the VWAP reclaim (slipped 7517.8->7514), 5m momentum turned negative -0.05%. GEX: king magnet flipped from the bullish 7540 pika to a BARNEY at 7515 now sitting right overhead as resistance = bullish drift thesis invalidated. Cut the small loss fast per method.
